Dimitri

Senior Mobile Engineer (iOS + React Native)
Okafor-

18 compatibility; reduced transaction failure rate by 12% (2.8%→2.46%) across 500M+
Nikolaev
annual transactions and improved cold-start launch time by 280ms through lazy-loading
and code stripping

directly contributing ~$18M incremental ARR
☎ +44 20 7946 0958 Mentored team of 6 junior iOS engineers; established mobile code review standards
reducing critical bugs by 67% (Q1: 22 issues → Q4: 7 issues); managed sprint velocity

DmitriOkaforNikolaev
⌥ Mobile Engineer (iOS Specialist)
⌘ https://dimitriokafor.dev Redesigned iOS app's real-time FX quote engine using reactive streams (RxSwift); cut
UI update latency by 420ms (650ms→230ms) and reduced battery drain by 31% in
◆ EDUCATION foreground usage through optimized refresh intervals
Shipped multi-currency wallet feature (iOS + Android via Flutter bridge); achieved 89%
ETH Zurich (Swiss Federal Institute of adoption rate (Day 30 DAU) among 3.2M iOS users; feature generated £4.7M in new
Technology) cross-currency fees in first year

Implemented on-device biometric authentication system supporting Face ID, Touch ID,
Distributed Computing)
2017–2019 and fallback mechanisms; reduced authentication failure rates by 58% (8.3%→3.5%)
Thesis on real-time iOS networking and improved user NPS by 22 points in post-launch survey of 15K users

340ms across 50K+ concurrent Mobile Engineer (Cross-Platform)
connections using custom socket

buffering—published in ACM MobiSys rendering achieving 60fps consistency across all iPhone models (XS, XR, 11) with
workshop average GPU memory footprint of 186MB vs. 320MB initial implementation
Dean's Honours (GPA 3.89/4.0); Chair of
Built real-time sync engine for collaborative editing using WebSocket + local SQLite;
ETH Mobile Development Club—grew

participants

Shopify 2017–2019
2013–2017
iOS Engineer
Specialized in mobile & embedded
Built Shopify Point of Sale (POS) iOS app module for inventory sync; optimized
systems; capstone: cross-platform
database queries reducing sync time from 12.3s to 2.1s for 50K SKU catalogs; impacted

85K+ retail stores globally
connection stability vs. 94.2% industry
baseline Shipped payment processing feature supporting 12 payment gateways; achieved 99.2%
transaction success rate and reduced average transaction processing time by 340ms

through batching and pre-authorization caching
Ontario Engineering Award; competed in
ACM ICPC (Top 20 regionals) Led iOS app accessibility audit and remediation; improved WCAG 2.1 AA compliance
score from 61% to 94%; directly enabled 120K+ users with visual/motor impairments to
◆ SKILLS access platform
Languages PROJECTS
Swift Kotlin JavaScript/TypeScript
MotionSync 2020–2021
Python Objective-C C++ Swift, SwiftUI, CoreAnimation, Metal, Firebase
Technologies Open-source iOS animation library for synchronized multi-device interactions; 2,847
iOS (UIKit SwiftUI) React Native GitHub stars, 12.3K weekly downloads on CocoaPods; featured in Ray Wenderlich's
Flutter Core Data SQLite WebSocket 'Best iOS Libraries' (2021)
GRPC GraphQL Firebase ARKit Benchmarked 140% faster frame render time vs. CABasicAnimation baseline through
CoreLocation AVFoundation Metal Metal-accelerated interpolation; maintained 60fps across iPhone SE to iPhone 13 Pro
with <8MB memory overhead
Tools
Xcode Android Studio Git Jira PlatformBridge 2020–Present
Jenkins GitHub Actions Instruments Kotlin, Swift, C++, JNI, React Native
Figma Proxyman Charles Proxy Cross-platform native module abstraction library enabling 60% code reuse between iOS
and Android codebases without sacrificing performance; 834 GitHub stars, adopted by
App Annie analytics LLDB debugger
18 mid-market fintech companies
Reduced inter-process communication (IPC) latency from 45ms to 8ms through custom
C++ serialization layer; eliminated 3 major memory leak classes affecting long-running
background processes
CacheVault 2021–Present
Swift, SQLite, GRPC, Protobuf
Persistent caching framework for iOS with multi-tier eviction policy (LRU + LFU hybrid);
1,456 GitHub stars, 8.9K monthly downloads; 23% faster cold-start vs. standard
Foundation URLCache
Implemented advanced compression using ZSTD codec achieving 73% size reduction
for JSON payloads; reduced cloud storage costs by $42K annually across 6 internal
Stripe services processing 340B+ cache objects/month
EXTRACURRICULAR
React Native EU Conference 2021–2023
Conference Speaker & Workshop Organizer
Delivered keynote 'Building Production-Grade Cross-Platform Apps' (500+ attendees,
78K YouTube views); workshop materials downloaded 34K+ times and cited in 12 open-
source projects
Co-organized React Native performance optimization track attracting 180 engineers;
post-conference survey: 92% satisfaction rate and 68% reported implementing
recommendations within 2 weeks
iOS.dev Community (Open Source Maintainer) 2019–Present
Core Contributor & Technical Mentor
Maintain 3 active Swift libraries with 50+ community pull requests reviewed annually;
mentored 12 junior iOS engineers toward first open-source contribution—8 became
regular contributors
Reduced issue resolution time from 14 days to 2.3 days through CI/CD automation and
triage guidelines; achieved 97% community satisfaction score (Net Promoter Score) in
2023 survey of 287 library users
